title: Expansive Lighting
body:
# Expansive Lighting
Between the addition of a lamp whose output light is the same as the Redstone signal put into it, colored torches, and much more (eventually:tm:) you have many more ways to light your base and look snazzy too!

## Planned Features
- (Corner) Strip Panel Lights
- Lightbulb (works like a lantern)
- RGB Gamer Strip Light
- Glowstone/Shroomlight type block
